audit-public-release.py.justification: Audits GitHub release assets, Homebrew behavior, attestations, and public consumer release metadata.

benchmark-realpass.py.justification: Runs explicit Go-vs-Python upstream comparison benchmarks; not part of default consumer readiness.

check-agent-contracts.py.justification: Validates generated CLI/MCP/skills contracts used by public CI and release workflows.

check-public-release-contract.py.justification: Validates public repository shape, manifest allowlist, formula metadata, and leak checks.

check-python-removal-readiness.py.justification: Validates node-direct consumer readiness artifacts emitted by the no-Python canary.

check-release-benchmark-evidence.py.justification: Private tag gate validates committed benchmark evidence freshness before public release.

export-public-gomoufox.py.justification: Private mirror exporter; public repositories should not run private export logic.

fingerprint-audit.py.justification: Explicit release/benchmark audit comparing Python Camoufox, Python sidecar, and node-direct fingerprints.

format-doc-numbers.py.justification: Small deterministic doc formatter used in public CI and release workflows.

package-release.py.justification: Builds deterministic public release archives, checksums, formula, provenance, and SBOM.

python-realpass.py.justification: Explicit upstream Python Camoufox baseline for benchmark and fingerprint comparisons only.

realpass-merge-retry-reports.py.justification: Private realpass release gate helper for focused retry evidence merging.

realpass-retry-targets.py.justification: Private realpass release gate helper for selecting retry targets.

update-python-locks.py.justification: Maintainer-only Python lock regeneration for legacy Python-sidecar mode; consumers do not need it.
